title: No, Britain Is Not Having a Christian Revival
summary_full: A study said church attendance had soared among British young people, a trend reversal that excited religious conservatives around the world. Turns out it wasn’t true.
summary_public: A study said church attendance had soared among British young people, a trend reversal that excited religious conservatives around the world. Turns out it wasn’t true.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Britain Is Not Having a Christian Revival
